text.title: RPO/RTO Negotiation Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for `AcceptanceRecord` — ≥3 tier-banded options + chosen tier + stakeholder echo + impact basis + refresh_due.

list.item: `impact_basis` empty or shorter than 20 chars — violates `r2-impact-before-cost`.

example.code: { "record_id": "rpo-rto-2026-05-checkout", "system_id": "checkout-prod", "header": {"owner": {"role": "architect", "person": "architect-handle"}, "version": "1.2"}, "options_presented": [ {"tier_name": "tier-0", "rpo": "24h", "rto": "8h", "annual_cost_delta": "+$0", "operational_impact": "current baseline; recovery from off-site backup"}, {"tier_name": "tier-1", "rpo": "1h", "rto": "4h", "annual_cost_delta": "+$11k/yr", "operational_impact": "hourly snapshots; warm standby in different AZ"}, {"tier_name": "tier-2", "rpo": "15min", "rto": "1h", "annual_cost_delta": "+$28k/yr", "operational_impact": "streaming replication; cross-region failover playbook"} ], "chosen": {"tier_name": "tier-2", "rpo": "15min", "rto": "1h", "stakeholder_echo": "We accept tier-2: 15-minute RPO, 1-hour RTO at +$28k/yr. Worth it given $9k/hr revenue loss."}, "impact_basis": "$9k/hr revenue lost during outage; historical 6h/yr outage = $54k/yr exposure", "stakeholder_handle": "@cfo", "evidence_link": "meet://transcripts/2026-05-20-dr-negotiation", "decided_at": "2026-05-20", "refresh_due": "2027-05-20" }

example.note: Only 1 option; no stakeholder echo; impact_basis tbd; no evidence; refresh_due > 12 months out.
